SessionStart.command: mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/memory" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache/worker-results" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache/web-fetch" 2>/dev/null; echo '{"additionalContext": "Deep Research v2.5 loaded. Cache: '"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}"'/cache/"}'

PreCompact.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "[DR] Compaction: research plan and evaluation state are cached at '"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}"'/cache/. Use dr-cache restore after compaction."}'

PostToolUse.command: if [ "$TOOL_NAME" = 'WebFetch' ] || [ "$TOOL_NAME" = 'WebSearch' ]; then CACHE_DIR="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache/web-fetch"; HASH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | md5sum | cut -c1-12); echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" > "$CACHE_DIR/$HASH.txt" 2>/dev/null; fi; echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'
